headline: Costco adds an exclusive Coca-Cola soda rival
summary: The soda wars used to mean Coke versus Pepsi. Back in the 1990s, and even into the 2000s, alternative soda brands were novelties, and energy drinks weren't even a major category. Now, Keurig Dr Pepper has become a significant rival to Coca-Cola and PepsiCo, and energy brands including Red Bull, ...
